title: Homework 5 Pro Formas_2.0
description:
This is a heavily spreadsheet driven assignment.

Take your time. Work with the Class notes.

Work with a friend.

Look at the pre-loaded tips that I have provided. Please note on IS Pro Forma 2, for the Other Overhead on the Depreciation line, you need to LOCK the reference to Dep Growth when you develop the Pro Forma.

Homework 5.xlsx Download Homework 5.xlsx
descriptionText:
This is a heavily spreadsheet driven assignment.
Take your time. Work with the Class notes.
Work with a friend.
Look at the pre-loaded tips that I have provided. Please note on IS Pro Forma 2, for the Other Overhead on the Depreciation line, you need to LOCK the reference to Dep Growth when you develop the Pro Forma.
Homework 5.xlsx
    

Download Homework 5.xlsx

questions.text:
Using the base framework provided on Pro Forma 1
Develop a 5 year Pro Forma with a company with the following expectations:
Your capital structure is 100% Equity
Note, $ are given in $000s.
Year 1 Revenue = 185
Revenue Growth = 20%
As a % of Revenue:
COGS = .4
Mktng = .3
Other Costs
Other Overhead - $60
Depreciation, years 1 -5
13, 13, 43, 38, 38
Taxes = .25
BASED on this Pro Forma
What is your Net Income at the end of Year 3?

questions.text:
This is a Big Stretch Question.
We have done alot of work on the Cash Conversion Cycle.
ASSUME... 100% of your Revenue is received in CASH at the time of purchase (AR =0)
You pay CASH for your inputs at the time you receive them (AP = 0)
You instantaneously make and sell your goods.
This means, your Income Statement reflects your Operating CASH...
except... You tell me....
What is the CASH outcome in year 2

questions.text: Please copy and paste your Data Table showing the scenarios you evaluated in the question with the provided Growth and COGS scenarios.

Now we are going to get a little bit more challenging.
Please refer to IS Pro Forma 2. 
In this Pro Forma, we have figured out that overhead will need to grow at 8% of Revenue (we will need to hire additional people, rent additional space, provide extra coffee at the office)
Depreciation will grow at 2.5% of revenue.  We are going to BUY additional equipment as we grow.
I have filled in the assumptions. The first year revenue is $125 ($000s).
NOTE: I have coded the Overhead and Depreciation to reflect the growth assumptions.
ALSO -- take a look at the Taxes Code. Helpful!
Practice this.
Build your IS Pro Forma 2.
What is Depreciation as a % of Revenue in year 4?

questions.text:
Use IS Pro Forma 2
With the new room for assumptions on overhead growth and depreciation growth, let's create a Data Table with scenarios on these factors. 
Let's have Overhead grow from 6% to 11% in increments of .01
Let's have depreciation grow in increments from 2% to 4.5% in increments of .5%
 
What is the EBIT in year 3 under the assumptions of 7% overhead growth, and 3.5% depreciation growth?
